title: aces crusader pack
description: this pack overhauls already existing features to make it feel more medeval
body:
Crusader Pack is a medieval-inspired Minecraft resource pack that transforms your world with knightly visuals and historical designs. Key features include:

- Cleric Villager: Redesigned to resemble a medieval eastern scholar or monk, adding a noble and ancient atmosphere to your game.
- Totem of Undying: Updated to feature an ornate, cross-like symbol, invoking strength and protection.
- Armor Trim: Adds a decorative, crusader pattern to your armor, perfect for players who love medieval styles and battle-ready looks.
- more comming soon

This pack is for players who enjoy historical themes and want to add a noble, knightly flair to their Minecraft adventures!
